params.name: bass_drive
params.description: How hard the kick swells the core disc.

params.name: ring_count
params.description: Rings across the frame before the mids pack more in.

params.name: ring_density
params.description: How many extra rings a loud midrange packs in.

params.name: drift_speed
params.description: How fast the low mids drift the rings outward.

params.name: sparkle_gain
params.description: How brightly the highs twinkle in the sparkle grid.

params.name: grain
params.description: How much per-pixel shimmer the air band adds.

params.name: glow
params.description: How much spectral flux glows the edge of the core.

params.name: vignette
params.description: How far the corners of the frame fall off.

params.name: flash
params.description: Whether an onset flashes the core brighter.
